storyInfo: Wang angers Shuo by allowing Ju to escape from the Yanese army. Shuo advocates taking a proper, steady approach to fighting Sui, while Wang seeks a decisive breakthrough. Ling mediates their conflict and explains to Wang her plan to protect their siblings from Sui.

attributes.text: Pointless obsession, pointless struggle, pointless sacrifice... you have been fearful for centuries.
You divided my awakening into hundreds of cycles, each of which is subdivided by twelve, then subdivided by thirty, and then...
You live in constant fear every minute, every second, fearing the time limit, though you do not know when it will come...
Have 'I' become so foolish and shortsighted in the span of just a few dreams?

attributes.content: Without a will, without a self, without someone to measure and define it, time is no more than a cycle without meaning...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: As the time you spent in the tomb was.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: How do you define this time, if you neither think nor feel?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.text: A dream hysterical for its inevitable end?

attributes.content: The mounts, seas, and all in between shall be our master's!
attributes.name: Determined Shanhaizhong Member

attributes.content: Heresy!
attributes.name: Yanese Border Force

attributes.content: *pant*... *pant*...
attributes.name: Determined Shanhaizhong Member

attributes.content: Drop your weapon and live!
attributes.name: Yanese Border Force

attributes.content: Drop my weapon?
attributes.name: Determined Shanhaizhong Member

attributes.content: We will teach the House of Yan that Ju has awakened, and their reign is no more than a fleeting dream compared to the infinity of heaven and earth!
attributes.name: Determined Shanhaizhong Member

attributes.content: The mounts, seas, and all in between shall be—
attributes.name: Determined Shanhaizhong Member

attributes.content: Come, drink!
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: Sir, I'm just a humble soldier—
attributes.name: Overwhelmed Soldier

attributes.content: Don't sell yourself short!
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: After centuries, we've finally eliminated the last remnant from that hunt! The lands of Yan are safe now!
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: A toast to all of you!
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: Thank you, sir!
attributes.name: Overwhelmed Soldier

attributes.content: And to the two of you, of course.
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: Mr. Shuo inspired the troops by always being the first to charge into the fray, while Mr. Wang's tactics were utterly flawless.
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: The bulk of the credit for taking down Ju must go to the two of you.
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: A toast to you.
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: ...Duoxie.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: This is a rare opportunity, Mr. Wang, and there is something I must say to you.
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: I know of the slanders against your name in the imperial court, casting suspicions upon you because you are not one of our kind.
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: But you have endured such slanders and made a historic contribution to Yan. Your noble heart is admirable.
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: To interfere even in family reunions... the Sui Regulator's restrictions on you are unreasonable.
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: I will petition to His Majesty to permit your family gathering...
attributes.name: Tipsy Commissioner

attributes.content: It's a joyful day. I consider myself a strong drinker, but it appears wine has gotten the best of me...
attributes.name: Drunken Commissioner

attributes.content: To tell the truth, my orders were to... keep an eye on you and make sure nothing goes wrong.
attributes.name: Drunken Commissioner

attributes.content: But the two of you have proven yourself... utterly loyal... most respectable!
attributes.name: Drunken Commissioner

attributes.content: This is as far as I go... take care!
attributes.name: Drunken Commissioner

attributes.content: The drunken official manages a farewell and departs, helped by his bodyguards.
A good man, but a poor spy.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Did you think about what will happen to all of us if he finds out what you did?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: You are drunk.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I wish I were drunk, and all this was naught but a dream.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Why did you let the beastial Ju go?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Best to have a card up one's sleeve.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Who is your opponent this time?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: You must feel it. We all do... It is awakening, much sooner than the one thousand years that we expected.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: We need help.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Did Ju promise to help you defeat Sui?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: It is too weak to even protect the Shanhaizhong, and we have not gotten to that point. It is not time yet.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I told you. There are other ways to escape Its influence—
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: I know what you're going to say. You finally cleaned up the ties between you and It. You wanted 'Me' to no longer be 'Us', and 'We' no longer be 'It'...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: And you, you sealed 'Yourself' away in the sword...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What then? Did the Sui Regulator return your sword?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: We still live in shackles...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: True shackles do not come from outside—
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Do you really believe that everyone can be like you?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You remember everything and care about everything. People, events, and things from centuries past have all flowed away like the great river, but Shuo remains Shuo, always.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Not everyone can be like you...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: How long would it take for Dusk to become like you? What about Yu? Do you really want Yu to be like you?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: A thousand years is not enough, and we don't even have a thousand years.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: We don't have time.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I'm hardly your equal in weiqi, but I know that when there is no clear path to victory in sight, it is better to play in a straightforward manner, than to attempt radical tricks without a plan.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Do you think there is no victory in this game? That you would be content with doing all the right things in an honorable defeat?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I never said that...
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Your plan will have no other outcome.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What do you think we should do, then?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: If you truly found a path, tell me, and I will come with you—our chances would be better that way.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Just tell me what the chances are. You can use me however you want. I would be happy to give my life.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: But do you really know what you're doing?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Or has your obsession with victory blinded you to risks and consequences?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Tell me.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Say something.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Did you consider it?!
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: The proxy slams his palm on the stone table—or so he intended to.
But he has yet to adapt to his mortal vessel, and he misjudged both the strength and position.
A deep crack appears on the weiqi board that Wang always carries with him.
Wang, I—
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Impressive, brother. This human body you created for yourself can still split boulders.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Listen to me!
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: No, thank you.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: None of us could reach your heights, brother. You need not trouble yourself with our fates.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Wang!
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Had a fight with our eldest brother? Such is written all over your face.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I get drunk by the roadside for a couple of hours, and the two of you are already making trouble.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: If you have anything to say to him, you can say it to him directly.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Come now, there is no need for that.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I know what you were fighting over. Sui.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: This is not the first time you have fought over this. Can you not accept your differences?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: This is a matter of life and death. It's not something that can be glossed over so easily.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Would you keep fighting, even when the end comes?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Run not from the words that need to be said. The longer you delay this, the greater the problem grows.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Not today.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Wang... now, now, come back—
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Weiqi failure! Can you not act your age? Playing the brat in front of your younger sister?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Ling leads the way while Wang slowly follows behind.
They see the eldest proxy still sitting by the pavilion.
Dage. Our biggest brother.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Little Ling...
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: I have told you, calling me 'Little Ling' makes me feel like a child.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Sorry. Old habits die hard.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: So it would seem.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Hmph, smashing things in your rage? Are you the child here?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I'll fetch some good wood and make a new one for you.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Or would you prefer to keep this one? I can ask Nian or Yi to fix it, when they're here...
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: No need.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Oh... I recall the days when I had freshly awoken, watching you two fight amongst yourselves, time after time.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I remember the Candleholder asking me anxiously...
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: 'How bad will it get when all your younger siblings are born? Please, give me an estimation so that I can report to the court and get a disaster response plan set up!'
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Ahem.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: An idea, Dage: Let me speak to Wang, alone.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I will serve as your messenger this time, in order that you need not break anything else.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: ...Very well.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: So, about the weiqi board...
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Just leave it, brother. I'll repair it myself. No need to trouble yourself.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Alright.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: You are still angry.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: I'm not.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You only address him as 'brother' when you are angry.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: What were you arguing about? Tell me.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: It is just as I thought.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: His way is the proper way, but it is slow. If It were to suddenly awaken one day, it would all be too late.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: As for you... *sigh*
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: If you want to argue with him, should you not at least come up with a plan of your own?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: He gave up his sword to prove our innocence, the sword that means so very much to him. Do you feel no gratitude?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Are you perhaps... seriously furious that he smashed your board?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I'm just frustrated by his lack of urgency.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: We all seek a way. Dusk has even fewer ideas. Does she anger you too?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Its awakening is accelerating. We are all anxious, and it is understandable that we might provoke the occasional quarrel with inadvertent words.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: But it will take centuries for It to awaken. Maintaining a cordial relationship with Yan is the more pressing matter.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: Or are you saying that I, too, lack urgency?
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: No... that's not what I mean.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You said we're all looking for a way.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What are you looking for?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Your ears have merit.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: It and I, we are all nothing but a dream.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: This is just the seed of an idea, and I know not how far I can go.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: But I hope to leave behind a dream.
attributes.name: Ling

attributes.content: A dream that It cannot disturb, even if It has fully awakened.
attributes.name: Ling
